name: obsidian-auto-real-linker
description: Obsidian plugin that automatically inserts real wiki/markdown links for text matching note titles or aliases (debounced, IME-safe).

scripts.deploy: cp main.js manifest.json styles.css "${OBSIDIAN_VAULT:?Set OBSIDIAN_VAULT to your vault root, e.g. ~/Vault}/.obsidian/plugins/auto-real-linker/"
scripts.build:deploy: npm run build && npm run deploy
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: hyrness
